verses.text: God bids Hosea love again an adulterous woman, 'according to the love of the LORD toward... Israel'; he buys her back for silver and barley. Redeeming love. God's love reclaims the unworthy at a price.

God bids Hosea love again an adulterous woman, 'according to the love of the LORD toward... Israel'; he buys her back for silver and barley. Redeeming love. God's love reclaims the unworthy at a price.

She must abide many days without harlotry; so Israel shall be many days without king or sacrifice, then 'return, and seek the LORD... and David their king.' Discipline then return. A long stripping leads the heart back to God and His Anointed.
